issues.description: Effect requires conditional ordering: must first trash 1 Life card ('You may trash...'), then conditionally reveal and add Character to Life. Current DSL shows RevealFromHand as primary action. Should be: trash Life card first (with 'may' optionality), then reveal Character (conditional on trash), then add to Life.

Missing the 'add it to the top of your Life cards face-down' action. After revealing Character, must execute action to place it on top of Life pile. Current DSL only reveals, does not complete the effect chain.
Filter should be exactly cost 5 ('cost of 5'), not 'maxCost'. Use 'cost':5 instead of 'maxCost':5.
The 'may' optionality is implicit but should be explicitly handled at the Life card trash step, not the reveal step.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards: Reveal up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 from your hand and add it to the top of your Life cards face-down.
